arts.ttl: Arsenal join Chelsea and Manchester United in race for forward with £30m release clause
arts.sum: Arsenal have joined Manchester United and Chelsea in expressing interest in signing Liam Delap from Ipswich Town this summer. Delap has been the silver lining in an otherwise tough season for Ipswich, whose Premier League relegation was effectively confirmed at the weekend.
